domain: Italian Stradivarius violin (Cremona, 17th-18th c, Antonio Stradivari): top/back plate spruce/maple wood seasoned for years; plate thickness graduated micron-precisely (tiny thickness change = large frequency shift); wood treated with mineral salts (borax/zinc/copper/alum/lime); ground-coat calcium-rich + final-varnish oil/resin layered; selective damping (varnish dampens weak freq preserves strong fundamentals + harmonics); low internal wood damping yields strongly peaked resonances
specific_mechanism: STRADIVARIUS-SELECTIVE-FREQUENCY-DAMP: 4-component feedback-attenuation. (1) STFT/wavelet decomposition of gradient signal g_t (over training steps) into K frequency bands G_1, ..., G_K. (2) Per-band selective damping: d_k high for 'weak/spurious' bands (high-frequency oscillation), d_k low for 'strong fundamental + harmonic' bands (low-frequency dominant signal); modified gradient g_t' = sum_k (1 - d_k) * G_k. (3) Plate-thickness graduation: layer-wise gradient-norm budget beta_l (per layer); tiny changes in beta_l = large effect; calibrated via held-out validation. (4) Wood-seasoning warmup: pre-training warmup phase H_warm where high-frequency gradient bands G_high are gradually attenuated (d_high anneals 1 -> 0.3) until reaches well-seasoned steady-state. (5) Mineral-salt chemical pretraining filter: pre-training data filter that removes salt-like contaminants (high-leverage low-quality samples) which destabilize frequency response, mirroring borax/zinc/copper wood preservation. (6) Differs from R487 BHANGRA-DHOL-DUAL-DAMP (dual-band high/low EMA damp, only 2 bands + no plate-budget + no warmup + no data filter) by per-band selective damping coefficient + plate-thickness layer-wise grad-norm budget + wood-seasoning warmup + mineral-salt pretraining data filter.
llm_application: STRADIVARIUS-SELECTIVE-FREQUENCY-DAMP STFT/wavelet K-band gradient decomposition + per-band selective damping coefficient d_k (preserve fundamental + attenuate weak) + plate-thickness layer-wise gradient-norm budget beta_l + wood-seasoning H_warm warmup phase high-frequency band annealing + mineral-salt pretraining data filter removing high-leverage destabilizing samples. Differs from R376 QAJAQ. R390 SAMI. R417 VEPS. R439 INUIT. R448 ULKANTUN. R462 WABI-SABI. R487 BHANGRA-DHOL-DUAL-DAMP (closest — dual-band high/low EMA damp, 2-band not K-band + no plate-budget + no warmup + no filter). Differs from Spike No More COLM 2025 + SPAM Spike-Aware Adam + DAPO/GSPO stabilization + linear-decay-to-zero + GRPO stabilization by per-band selective damping coefficient + plate-thickness layer-wise grad-norm budget + wood-seasoning warmup + mineral-salt pretraining data filter. Differs by K-BAND SELECTIVE DAMP + PLATE-THICKNESS BUDGET + WOOD-SEASONING WARMUP + MINERAL-SALT FILTER.
novelty_claim: Spike No More + SPAM + DAPO/GSPO + linear-decay LR + GRPO stabilization literature cover gradient damping + spike-aware + warmup space. STRADIVARIUS-SELECTIVE-FREQUENCY-DAMP adds (a) STFT/wavelet K-band gradient frequency decomposition + (b) per-band selective damping coefficient + (c) plate-thickness layer-wise grad-norm budget + (d) wood-seasoning warmup high-freq annealing + (e) mineral-salt data filter. Recombination — borderline lookup.
